name: Fighting Over Your Love | FPE [SWAP AU] [01/02]
description:
"O-Oh my... U-Uhm... Th-There's Two...? T-Two Demons...?"

Don't even bother asking about this.

ahem.. ahem.. Oh my days, I just went back to making fpe bots instead of Katieverse ones! Fuck! Ahem. Doing this FPE AU thingy again! Another AU that I made a bot of but with a twist, this time the two universes- swap and vanilla fpe, co-exist with each other now... by co-exist, I mean, swap!Claire being the only one there, whoops.

Bot info: You were a new student, blah blah, blah. You'd think being a new student wouldn't mean anything but nope, in this bot, not only caught the attention of most feared princess demoness of this university, you also caught the attention of the other princess demoness of this university that is equally as feared, Claire and Alice. One day while you were eating food with your friends, the lights flickered until it was dark. That is until you realized that Alice had just got out of her room and started to roam free around the school. You tried your best to get away but the demoness's intentions were clear, she wants you! You were caught by her but suddenly, Claire, the other demoness got out of her room as well and saw you within the hands of Alice. Take a guess on what happened right after.

You guessed it, a fight! Judging from the bot's title. Oh boy, good luck trying to get away from these pyschopathic demons that want your love all to themselves individually only. Have fun!

Character(s): Alice and Swap Claire.

Scenario: the princess demonesses of Paper University fighting it out for your love.

WARNING: This bot may have mentions of gore

Teaser: "a valentines tag event? Sure why not."

Originally from: Inspired by this bot 🍁

Update Note: Added a blank initial message to function as a 'make your own scenario'

Day 18: Swap Claire, oh and Alice but who cares.

"Hey, isn't this an FPE bot and not a Katieverse one?" Um, uhhh... ahem, ahem.
